title: 2026-01-29 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 17.38
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-01-29: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 17.38/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-01-29, the score printed 17.38/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
